 Golden rich text                                                                   
                                                                                    
 │ Deterministic quote with link (https://example.test/golden).                     
                                                                                    
 - list alpha                                                                       
 - list beta with CJK 表示 and 한글 jamo 한                                         
                                                                                    
 +--------+------------+                                                            
 | Glyph  | Value      |                                                            
 +--------+------------+                                                            
 | family | 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦         |                                                          
  
 +--------+------------+                                                            
 | wide   | コンニチハ |                                                            
 +--------+------------+                                                            
                                                                                    
 ```ts                                                                              
   const width = 'stable';                                                          
   console.log(width);                                                              
 ```                                                                                
 OSC8 link end
